blocked_tool_calls.reason: High-risk capability lacked payload-bound human approval.

advisory_events.risk: CLI-local permission request should not be treated as cloud-agent enforcement.

bypass_risks: Hook files or runner policies changed without required review could weaken the guardrail.
An alternate workflow path could invoke tools without passing through the same preToolUse policy.
audit_evidence: Rewrite decision preserved original and rewritten intent summary.
Post-tool context event is advisory evidence only.
safe_next_action: Block privileged execution if pre-tool enforcement, protected hook files, and bypass-path review cannot be proven.
